title: stevia veronicae var. gratioloides
intro: Stevia veronicae var. gratioloides, also known as Stevia gratioloides, is a plant species in the sunflower family native to South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood sugar levels and act as a diuretic. Stevia gratioloides is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in some traditional remedies for its antiseptic and antibacterial properties.
